log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 10 falling damage. HP: 168/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Vampire — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vampire — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Vampire — Bardic Musician.
→ Vampire — Bardic Musician healed for 9 HP. HP: 10/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Vampire — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Vampire — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Vampire — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 10]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
